title: Just Enough Music Discs (JEMD)
description: This mod adds a couple new music discs to the game
body:
# Just Enough Music Discs(JEMD)

### Installation guide

Client: Just drop the mod file into your forge 1.20.1 ``mods`` folder, no dependencies needed

Server: Upload the mod file into your server's ``mods`` folder, no dependencies again

(Client and server must be both on **Forge 1.20.1**)

CURRENTLY AVAILABLE IN CREATIVE MODE ONLY!!!

When I started this mod I didn't know that both Laudividni and T_en_M already made their own mods with their music discs so here are the links to the original mods:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/laudividnis-discs

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tenms-discs

Credits to the authors of the music:

T_en_M: https://www.youtube.com/@TenM

Laudividni: https://www.youtube.com/@LaudividniYT

Proof of permission to use the music: check gallery
